name: Almond Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, cinnamon, ginger, salt, and baking soda.
2. In a large bowl, cream the butter until smooth.
3. Add the instant coffee powder, almond extract, granulated sugar, and brown sugar to the butter mixture. Beat well.
4. Add the eggs one at a time until smooth after each addition.
5. On low speed, gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the butter mixture, scraping the bowl with a rubber spatula until the mixture is smooth.
6. Gently mix in the slivered almonds.
7. Spread two pieces of wax paper on a work surface.
8. Place large spoonfuls of the dough lengthwise on each piece of paper to form heavy strips about 10-11 inches long.
9. Fold the long sides of the paper against the dough and press with your hands to shape each strip into an oblong that is 12 inches long, 3 inches wide, and about 1 inch thick.
10. Wrap the shaped dough in the wax paper.
11. Place the wrapped packages of dough in the freezer or refrigerator for several hours or overnight to firm up.
12. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
13. Unwrap one package at a time and place it on an ungreased cookie sheet.
14. Cut the dough into 1/4-inch slices using a very sharp knife, spacing each slice about 1 to 1 1/2 inches apart.
15. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly colored and springy when pressed with a fingertip.
Yield: 4 dozen cookies.
